content.title: Horror.Place Contract Card v1
content.description: Machine-readable contract card encoding invariants, metrics, and style contracts for horror seed/scene generation. Validated against Horror.Place doctrine and Dead-Ledger governance.

title.description: Human-readable label for the contract card (seed/scene identifier).

styleid.description: Reference to style contract governing aesthetic/behavioral tone (e.g., STY-DARKWOOD-FOREST).

schemaref.description: Schema reference for the entity type this card creates (seed, event, persona, etc.).

invariants.description: Target values for core horror mechanics invariants.

CIC.description: Clue-to-Incident Ratio: balance of evidence vs. overt events.

AOS.description: Ambiguity-to-Oppression Score: tension from uncertainty vs. direct threat.

RRM.description: Resource-Restriction Metric: scarcity of tools/safety/escape options.

LSG.description: Locus-Safety Gradient: perceived safety differential across space.

DET.description: Dread Event Threshold: intensity cap for overt scare events.

SHCI.description: Spectral-Harmonic Consistency Index: coherence of supernatural manifestations.

metrics.description: Acceptable [min, max] bands for outcome metrics.

UEC.description: Uncertainty Engagement Coefficient: player engagement via ambiguity.

EMD.description: Evidential Mystery Density: unresolved clues per unit time.

STCI.description: Safe-Threat Contrast Index: alternation between safety and danger.

CDL.description: Cognitive Dissonance Load: mutually plausible explanations held simultaneously.

ARR.description: Ambiguous Resolution Ratio: partial vs. full story resolution.

notes.description: Designer rationale for chosen parameters; non-binding documentation.

deadledgerref.description: Placeholder reference to Dead-Ledger entry for provenance/attestation.

policyprofile.description: Policy tier governing allowable invariant/metric ranges.

entitlementtier.description: Access tier for this contract (controls agent capabilities).
